message:
feat(scheduler): add pinned_worker field to TaskRecord for worker affinity

Allow local (!Send) tasks to be explicitly pinned to a specific worker
thread, preventing the scheduler from migrating them.

- Add optional pinned_worker: Option<usize> field to TaskRecord
- Add pin_to_worker() setter and pinned_worker() accessor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
